redis_py.signature: set(, name: str,, path: str,, obj: JsonType,, nx: Optional[bool] = False,, xx: Optional[bool] = False,, decode_keys: Optional[bool] = False,)

jedis.signature: String jsonSet(String key, Path path, Object pojo)
String jsonSet(String key, Path path, Object pojo, JsonSetParams params)
default String jsonSet(String key, Object object)

lettuce_sync.signature: String jsonSet(K key, JsonPath jsonPath, JsonValue value, JsonSetArgs options)

params.name: key
params.description: the key holding the JSON document.

params.name: jsonPath
params.description: the JsonPath pointing to the value(s) where we want to set the value.

params.name: options
params.description: the JsonSetArgs the options for setting the value.

returns.description: String "OK" if the set was successful, null if the JsonSetArgs conditions are not met. @since 6.8

params.name: value

returns.description: The status reply for the set operation.
